# Ethiopia Today

> Daily utilities for Ethiopia — Ethiopian calendar, USD-ETB exchange rate, gold prices, current time in Addis Ababa, public holidays, and useful calculators. Free, fast and ad-light.

Ethiopia Today is a reference site for the small numbers Ethiopians look up every day: today's date in the Ge'ez calendar, the current time in East Africa Time, the day's exchange and gold rates, upcoming holidays, and simple calendar-aware calculators.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Today's Ethiopian date, live time in Addis Ababa, and the full index of daily utilities.
- [Ethiopian Calendar](/ethiopian-calendar): Full-month view of the Ge'ez calendar with matching Gregorian dates.
- [Ethiopian Date Today](/ethiopian-date-today): What today is in the Ethiopian calendar, with the Amharic month name.
- [Calendar Converter](/ethiopian-calendar-converter): Convert any date between the Ethiopian and Gregorian calendars.
- [Currency Converter](/currency-converter): Convert Ethiopian Birr to USD, EUR, GBP and other major currencies.
- [USD to ETB](/usd-to-etb): Today's US Dollar to Ethiopian Birr reference rate.
- [Gold Price in Ethiopia](/gold-price-ethiopia): Reference gold price per gram in ETB.
- [Time in Ethiopia](/time-in-ethiopia): Current time in Addis Ababa (EAT, UTC+3) plus the Ethiopian 12-hour clock.
- [Ethiopian Holidays](/ethiopian-holidays): Public and religious holidays observed in Ethiopia this year.
- [Age Calculator](/age-calculator): Your age in both the Ethiopian and Gregorian calendars.
- [Date Difference](/date-difference): Days, weeks and months between any two dates.

## Optional

- [About](/about): What Ethiopia Today is and who it's for.
- [Contact](/contact): How to reach us.
- [Privacy](/privacy): Privacy policy.
- [Terms](/terms): Terms of use.
- [Cookies](/cookies): Cookie policy.
